Product.title: Product
Product.description: An ecommerce product of Dubai Bazar

category.description: The category name this product belongs to

isFeatured.description: Whether the product is highlighted in the hero section

isTrending.description: Whether the product has a trending badge

specifications.description: Key-value pair specifications of the product

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

views.description: Number of times this product details were viewed

/products/{productId}.description: Global collection containing all the digital products of Dubai Bazar.

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Determines the list of valid e-commerce categories.

/admins/{adminId}.description: Admin entries containing credentials for verification.
